description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

From April 1, 2026 (Reiwa 8), the Environment and Green Water Division will relocate to the Clean Center.

When you need to visit, please come to the office on the 3rd floor of the Clean Center.

New address: 768-1 Shimohata, Hanno City

Please refer to the map below for the new location.

Map of new location (PDF file: 292.6KB)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/kankyomidorimizuka/13383.html
summary: ℹ️ Environment and Green Water Division moving to new location
